experiment.name: HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_SHARED_GATE_UP_DUAL
experiment.intent: Replace the proposer's two shared expert BF16 dense gate/up launches with one dense_dual_gemv_out_bf16_wmma launch writing concatenated gate/up output.
experiment.decision: Keep as opt-in diagnostic only. The direct proposer slice improved, but repeated full-suite end-to-end wall and AR-normalized ratio regressed with identical acceptance.

correctness.exact_smoke_command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_SHARED_GATE_UP_DUAL=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-proposer-shared-gate-up-dual-smoke.json

default_path_smoke.command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_SHARED_GATE_UP_DUAL HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-proposer-shared-gate-up-dual-default-off-smoke.json

profile.command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_PROPOSER_SHARED_GATE_UP_DUAL=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --region proposer_all --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-proposer-shared-gate-up-dual-on-rocprof --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-proposer-shared-gate-up-dual-on-rocprof.json
profile.notes: A first profiler attempt was discarded because rocprofv3 inherited into a hipcc subprocess. A non-profiled cache warmup was run before the valid profile.
